info.description: This is Rest Api for Fluffy Doodle
info.title: Fluffy Doodle REST API

post.description: Creates a new course with image, category and level
Student signs up without code. Parent signs up with studentCode.

get.description: Returns a category by its id

post.description: Submits a task for a lesson and returns progress/rewards

get.description: Returns a list of forum categories

put.description: Marks a specific comment as the solution to the topic (only topic author can do this)

get.description: Returns a list of forum topics. Can be filtered by categoryId.
Returns topic details along with comments

post.description: Creates a new comment in a topic

get.description: Returns current authenticated user with role name
Returns all available frames and marks owned ones

post.description: Sets a frame as active for the user. Set frameId to 0 to remove frame.
Allows user to buy a frame using stars

get.description: Returns current child progress for authenticated parent
